arts.sum: Barcelona ended Raya Vallecano's run of three straight La Liga victories last time out thanks to a Robert Lewandowski penalty in a 1-0 win. Rayo were also unbeaten in the league since 1st December bef...

arts.ttl: Preview: Rayo Vallecano vs. Villarreal - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's La Liga clash between Rayo Vallecano and Villarreal, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
